summary: Iteration 11 Testing COMPLETED: All 4 Hero Slide improvements verified. Backend date filtering (14/14 tests passed), HeroCanvasEditor drag-and-drop canvas working, subtitle white color confirmed, expired slides correctly excluded from public.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/public/hero-slides filters by date range - only returns slides where date_start <= now <= date_end
Backend: GET /api/public/hero-slides returns slides with no dates set (always visible)
Backend: GET /api/public/hero-slides excludes expired slides (date_end in the past)
Backend: GET /api/public/hero-slides excludes future slides (date_start in the future)
Backend: GET /api/public/hero-slides shows slides with only start date in past
Backend: GET /api/public/hero-slides shows slides with only end date in future
Backend: GET /api/admin/hero-slides returns ALL slides (no date filtering for admin)
Backend: Admin sees 2 slides (including expired), Public sees 1 slide (only active)
Frontend: /admin/hero/add form has 'Layer Positioning' section with visual drag-and-drop canvas
Frontend: Drag-and-drop canvas shows 5 colored draggable blocks (Title-gold, Subtitle-teal, Description-blue, Button-purple, Video/Photo-pink)
Frontend: Canvas legend shows current X/Y coordinates for each layer
Frontend: /admin/hero/edit/{id} loads existing coordinates and positions blocks correctly on canvas
Frontend: Homepage hero subtitle is white text (rgb(255, 255, 255)) - confirmed via computed style
Frontend: Homepage hero only renders slides within their active date range (expired slide not shown)
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test slides (expired, active, future, no-dates) during backend testing to verify date filtering
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 features fully tested: (1) Date filtering on public endpoint works - slides filtered by date_start/date_end, expired slides excluded, no-dates slides always shown. (2) Admin endpoint returns ALL slides regardless of dates. (3) HeroCanvasEditor component at /app/frontend/src/components/HeroCanvasEditor.js provides visual drag-and-drop positioning with 5 colored blocks. (4) Subtitle color changed to white in HomePage.js line 91. (5) Existing slides in DB: id=7b858a93 (expired 03/27), id=35051426 (active 03/28-03/31).

date_filtering.public_endpoint: GET /api/public/hero-slides filters by current UTC time
date_filtering.expired_slides: Slides with date_end in past are excluded from public
date_filtering.future_slides: Slides with date_start in future are excluded from public
date_filtering.no_dates_slides: Slides with no dates are always visible
date_filtering.partial_dates: Slides with only start or only end date handled correctly

hero_canvas_editor.integration: Used in HeroSlideForm.js instead of manual X/Y inputs
